preferred_name_ml.fr: Transmetteur de débit à surface variable

definition: flow transmitter that throttles a stream through a constriction, the area of which changes to keep a constant differential pressure, in order to measure flow rate

definition_ml.en: flow transmitter that throttles a stream through a constriction, the area of which changes to keep a constant differential pressure, in order to measure flow rate
definition_ml.fr: transmetteur de débit qui étrangle un courant à travers un rétrécissement dont la surface varie pour maintenir une pression différentielle constante afin de mesurer le débit
definition_ml.de: Differenzdruck-Durchflussmessgerät, das einen Strom durch eine Engstelle drosselt, deren Bereich sich ändert, um den Differenzdruck konstant zu halten, um eine Durchflussrate zu messen
definition_ml.jp: 測定原理に開口面積を使用する流量計

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: flow transmitter that throttles a stream through a constriction, the area of which changes to keep a constant differential pressure, in order to measure flow rate
